_README: Per-project progress state. Fetch this FIRST before any work on the project; the assistant outputs an updated copy at every step boundary and the USER pushes it. Never trust the chat scroll — trust this file plus the DB.
notes: STATE TRUTH-UP 2026-07-12: previous state (stage=writing, batch 16 written, 15 published_slugs, dated 2026-06-18) was stale — export of 2026-07-12 shows all 80 articles published and DESIGN-NOTES.md locked (Come Up For Air). Corrected to stage=live. published_slugs list dropped from state (80 slugs; the DB + sitemap are the source of truth — see replatform block for the export snapshot reference).

replatform.goal: Re-platform greeceforamericans onto the v2 engine (Thailand-standard structure), KEEPING the Come Up For Air identity. Site is LIVE + indexed + already onboarded in common.sites — no fleet-onboarding step. All slugs/URLs preserved (route parity verified: /, /article/[slug], /category/[slug], /about, /disclosures, /search all exist on v2; new routes additive).

part1_fact_retrofit.defect_fixed: duplicated 'paying a fee of' in do-americans-need-visa-for-greece (approved)
apply_steps: 1. Run greece-facts.sql in Supabase SQL editor (service role) — BEFORE the article update, so spans never render on fallback
2. node scripts/articles-batch.mjs update retrofit-update.json  (from greece repo root; status preserved, no --set-status)
3. Verify /article/greece-entry-requirements renders data-fact-resolved spans (view-source or the debug route until it's removed)
4. OPTIONAL human-gated: check-config-proposal.sql for eu.cash_declaration, then a checker dry run
5. Push greece-facts.sql to travel-facts/greeceforamericans/ and this state.json
part1_fact_retrofit.note_fallbacks: The 4 eu.ees_status span fallbacks read 'being rolled out'-era wording (as written); DB value 'now fully in effect' supersedes at render. Normalizing fallback text was NOT done (content-as-written rule) — approve separately if wanted.

part2_engine_upgrade.plan: template-v2 base + port Greece identity layer (site.ts tokens+factRegions, theme, cufa globals.css, HeroBubbles/IslandIndex/GuideCards/SegmentBand/GreeceMap, DESIGN-NOTES) + run migration 0004 on schema greece + drop /api/debug-facts. Design imperfections list to be provided by user at this boundary; fixes verified against live rendered pages desktop+mobile per design-step.md.

part3_feature_set.plan: Everything Thailand-standard Greece lacks: reading time, TOC (+mobile), breadcrumbs, JSON-LD suite (Org/WebSite/Article/BreadcrumbList/FAQPage), RSS, 404, skip-link, TrustStrip, BestTimeStrip, CostCheatsheet + ItineraryPicker at /build-my-trip (reconcile with Greece's existing picker; every routed slug verified against the 80), /go/ affiliate route, /api/rates. All wired or not shipped (hard rule 12).

parked_ideas.idea: Short video (Instagram Reels) for richer 'what it's like there' proof
parked_ideas.decision: DEFERRED until all sites built + live. Do NOT embed live IG Reels in article bodies (kills Core Web Vitals / SEO, GDPR cookies, content rot). Preferred path when revisited: self-host short clips on Cloudinary (owned, fast, no cookies) — check Cloudinary video quota/pricing first; OR click-to-load facade for one curated Reel per pillar; OR own-brand Reels linked from footer/author bio only.
parked_ideas.revisit_when: post-launch, using real traffic data to target which pages get video

parked_ideas.idea: Normalize the 4 eu.ees_status span fallback texts to 'now fully in effect'
parked_ideas.decision: Not done in Part 1 (content-as-written rule). One-line approval applies it.
parked_ideas.revisit_when: any time; low priority since DB value supersedes at render
